title: Metals Decline As Threat Of Supply Disruptions Ease
section_path: Metals Decline As Threat Of Supply Disruptions Ease
section_path_text: Metals Decline As Threat Of Supply Disruptions Ease
summary:
Main
Concerns over Chinese demand weighed in sentiment, but this was countered by ongoing supply side issues. By Daniel Hynes
Nickel and aluminium fell as fears of supply disruptions eased. The two metals escaped any direct impact from the new US package of sanctions on Russia.
